goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'peking restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'area', and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
